speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: The New York Knicks will defeat the San Antonio Spurs and win the NBA Finals.
argument: Series deficit: He said San Antonio was down 3-1 and that the only hope left was that someone had come back from 3-1 before; Overall read: He told the Spurs fan asking the question that more than likely the series was over.
grade_note: NYK beat SAS 4-1, so the Knicks won the NBA Finals.
grade_note_general: NYK beat SAS 4-1, so the Knicks won the NBA Finals.
